---
title: "Build Analysis Dataframe (<10km)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(data.table)
```

## Inputs

```{r}
matched_ppd_file <- file.path("output", "matched_ppd.csv")
matched_epc_file <- file.path("output", "matched_epc.csv")
mapping_file <- file.path("output", "epc_ppd_mapping.csv")
distance_file <- file.path("input", "property_prison_distance.csv")
output_file <- file.path("output", "analysis_dataframe_lt10km.csv")
summary_text_file <- file.path("output", "analysis_dataframe_lt10km_summary.txt")
deed_year_distribution_text_file <- file.path("output", "analysis_dataframe_lt10km_distance_by_deed_year.txt")

# Parameters: columns to keep from each source table.
# Do not include join keys here; keys are always included automatically.
ppd_columns_keep <- c(
  "deed_date",
  "price_paid",
  "postcode",
  "lsoa21cd",
  "saon",
  "paon",
  "street",
  "locality",
  "town",
  "district",
  "county"
)

epc_columns_keep <- c(
  "UPRN",
  "TOTAL_FLOOR_AREA",
  "NUMBER_HABITABLE_ROOMS"
)

stopifnot(file.exists(matched_ppd_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(matched_epc_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(mapping_file))
stopifnot(file.exists(distance_file))
```

## Load Data

```{r}
matched_ppd <- fread(matched_ppd_file)
matched_epc <- fread(matched_epc_file)
mapping_dt <- fread(mapping_file)
distance_dt <- fread(distance_file)

ppd_selected_cols <- unique(c("unique_id", ppd_columns_keep))
epc_selected_cols <- unique(c("LMK_KEY", epc_columns_keep))

missing_ppd_cols <- setdiff(ppd_selected_cols, names(matched_ppd))
missing_epc_cols <- setdiff(epc_selected_cols, names(matched_epc))

if (length(missing_ppd_cols)) {
  stop("PPD missing requested column(s): ", paste(missing_ppd_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(missing_epc_cols)) {
  stop("EPC missing requested column(s): ", paste(missing_epc_cols, collapse = ", "))
}

matched_ppd_selected <- matched_ppd[, ..ppd_selected_cols]
data.table::setnames(matched_ppd_selected, "price_paid", "sold_amount", skip_absent = TRUE)

matched_epc_selected <- matched_epc[, ..epc_selected_cols]
```

## Build Analysis Dataframe

```{r}
# Keep only rows with usable geocoded distance at or below 10km.
distance_keep <- unique(
  distance_dt[
    geocode_status == "ok" & !is.na(distance_to_prison_m) & distance_to_prison_m <= 10000,
    .(
      unique_id,
      LMK_KEY,
      postcode_distance = postcode,
      distance_to_prison_m
    )
  ],
  by = c("unique_id", "LMK_KEY")
)

# For each deed sale, keep the EPC record whose date is closest to deed_date.
mapping_best <- mapping_dt[, .(
  unique_id = ppd_id,
  LMK_KEY = lmk_key,
  deed_date = as.Date(deed_date),
  inspection_date = as.Date(inspection_date),
  lodgement_date = as.Date(lodgement_date)
)]

mapping_best[, epc_event_date := fifelse(!is.na(lodgement_date), lodgement_date, inspection_date)]
mapping_best[, epc_event_date := as.Date(epc_event_date, origin = "1970-01-01")]
mapping_best <- mapping_best[!is.na(unique_id) & !is.na(LMK_KEY) & !is.na(deed_date) & !is.na(epc_event_date)]
mapping_best[, abs_days_diff := abs(as.integer(deed_date - epc_event_date))]
mapping_best[, epc_before_sale := epc_event_date <= deed_date]

setorder(mapping_best, unique_id, abs_days_diff, -epc_before_sale, -epc_event_date)
mapping_best <- mapping_best[, .SD[1], by = unique_id]

distance_keep <- merge(
  distance_keep,
  mapping_best[, .(unique_id, LMK_KEY, epc_event_date, abs_days_diff)],
  by = c("unique_id", "LMK_KEY"),
  all = FALSE
)

# Keep only rows that are matched in both PPD and EPC via inner joins.
analysis_df <- merge(
  distance_keep,
  matched_ppd_selected,
  by = "unique_id",
  all = FALSE
)

analysis_df <- merge(
  analysis_df,
  matched_epc_selected,
  by = "LMK_KEY",
  all = FALSE
)

normalize_house_part <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x <- toupper(x)
  gsub("[^A-Z0-9]", "", x)
}

# House-level key in PPD so repeated sales can be tracked across years.
analysis_df[, ppd_house_id := paste(
  normalize_house_part(postcode),
  normalize_house_part(saon),
  normalize_house_part(paon),
  normalize_house_part(street),
  sep = "|"
)]

```

## Write Output

```{r}
dir.create(dirname(output_file), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
fwrite(analysis_df, output_file)

cat("Wrote:", output_file, "\n")
cat("Rows:", format(nrow(analysis_df), big.mark = ","), "\n")
```

## Quick Checks

```{r}
analysis_df[, deed_date := as.Date(deed_date)]
analysis_df[, deed_year := as.integer(format(deed_date, "%Y"))]

summary_df <- analysis_df[, .(
  rows = .N,
  unique_ppd_sales = uniqueN(unique_id),
  unique_ppd_houses = uniqueN(ppd_house_id),
  min_distance_m = min(distance_to_prison_m, na.rm = TRUE),
  median_distance_m = median(distance_to_prison_m, na.rm = TRUE),
  max_distance_m = max(distance_to_prison_m, na.rm = TRUE),
  missing_lsoa = sum(is.na(lsoa21cd) | lsoa21cd == ""),
  missing_sold_amount = sum(is.na(sold_amount)),
  missing_floor_area = sum(is.na(TOTAL_FLOOR_AREA)),
  missing_habitable_rooms = sum(is.na(NUMBER_HABITABLE_ROOMS))
)]

ppd_repeat_sales_df <- analysis_df[
  !is.na(ppd_house_id) & ppd_house_id != "",
  .(
    sales = .N,
    years_sold = uniqueN(deed_year)
  ),
  by = ppd_house_id
][order(-sales, -years_sold)]

ppd_repeat_sales_summary <- ppd_repeat_sales_df[, .(
  houses_with_multiple_sales = sum(sales > 1),
  houses_sold_in_multiple_years = sum(years_sold > 1),
  max_sales_for_one_house = max(sales)
)]

epc_granularity_df <- matched_epc[, .(
  epc_rows = .N,
  unique_lmk_key = uniqueN(LMK_KEY),
  epc_rows_with_uprn = sum(!is.na(UPRN) & UPRN != ""),
  unique_uprn = uniqueN(UPRN[!is.na(UPRN) & UPRN != ""])
)]

epc_rows_per_uprn <- matched_epc[
  !is.na(UPRN) & UPRN != "",
  .N,
  by = UPRN
]

epc_granularity_summary <- epc_rows_per_uprn[, .(
  uprn_with_multiple_epc_rows = sum(N > 1),
  max_epc_rows_for_one_uprn = max(N)
)]

analysis_df[, distance_band := data.table::fcase(
  distance_to_prison_m < 2000, "<2km",
  distance_to_prison_m >= 2000 & distance_to_prison_m < 5000, "2-5km",
  distance_to_prison_m >= 5000 & distance_to_prison_m <= 10000, "5-10km",
  default = NA_character_
)]

distance_by_deed_year <- analysis_df[
  !is.na(deed_year) & !is.na(distance_band),
  .(houses = .N),
  by = .(deed_year, distance_band)
][order(deed_year, distance_band)]

distance_by_deed_year_wide <- data.table::dcast(
  distance_by_deed_year,
  deed_year ~ distance_band,
  value.var = "houses",
  fill = 0
)

setcolorder(
  distance_by_deed_year_wide,
  c(
    "deed_year",
    intersect(c("<2km", "2-5km", "5-10km"), names(distance_by_deed_year_wide))
  )
)

summary_lines <- c(
  "Analysis dataframe summary (<10km)",
  paste(capture.output(print(summary_df)), collapse = "\n"),
  "",
  "PPD repeat-sales summary (using ppd_house_id)",
  paste(capture.output(print(ppd_repeat_sales_summary)), collapse = "\n"),
  "",
  "EPC granularity summary",
  paste(capture.output(print(epc_granularity_df)), collapse = "\n"),
  paste(capture.output(print(epc_granularity_summary)), collapse = "\n")
)

writeLines(summary_lines, summary_text_file)

distribution_lines <- c(
  "Number of houses by deed_year with distance bands as columns (<2km, 2-5km, 5-10km)",
  paste(capture.output(print(distance_by_deed_year_wide)), collapse = "\n")
)

writeLines(distribution_lines, deed_year_distribution_text_file)

cat("Summary text written:", summary_text_file, "\n")
cat("Deed-year distribution text written:", deed_year_distribution_text_file, "\n")

summary_df
ppd_repeat_sales_summary
epc_granularity_df
epc_granularity_summary
distance_by_deed_year
distance_by_deed_year_wide
head(analysis_df, 10)
```
